name: Otto
description: Otto — AI spreadsheet-native workflow agent from HyperWrite. Runs browser research, enrichment, and data extraction tasks across table rows in parallel.

seo.title: Otto — No-code / Low-code App Builders
seo.meta_description: Otto: Otto — AI spreadsheet-native workflow agent from HyperWrite. Runs browser research, enrichment, and data extraction tasks across table rows in parallel.

when_to_use: AI agent enriching a lead list across rows in parallel
Browser research automation run over a spreadsheet column
Web scraping and summarization at scale via AI spreadsheet
Parallel data extraction tasks run by Otto across a table
Non-technical GTM team running research agents on a dataset

cons: Expensive at scale for heavy runs
Competes with Paradigm and Clay closely
review.verdict: Strong AI spreadsheet for enrichment workflows — pick between Otto, Paradigm, and Clay based on pricing and focus.
review.best_for: Growth, sales, and research teams enriching lists with AI-driven web lookups
review.not_for: Mission-critical pipelines needing deterministic, auditable data transformations

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: No explicit peak-lock evidence; default FALSE per rules.
